meaning: n.重量的单位,液量的单位
examples: I can take you to her, ser... but you will need to come alone.
Ser Kevan laid his hands on her shoulders, held her at arm's length.
The High Sparrow had been adamant, and Ser Kevan refused to lift a finger against him.
No obstante, hay diferencias de criterio entre los candidatos acerca de cuales deben ser estos cambios.
Neither Ser nor prosecutor Ilan Graff would describe the terms of the proposed agreement.
